description_long: This object is a hand tool with a long, narrow, serrated metal blade and a straight wooden handle. The blade is silver-gray, featuring a row of fine teeth along one edge, suitable for slicing through soft materials. The handle is rectangular, made of a medium-brown wood, and appears smooth and polished for comfortable gripping. The tool lacks any visible mechanical or powered components, such as a motor, chain, or safety guard. There are no visible logos, switches, or power indicators on the handle or blade. The overall design is simple and utilitarian, resembling a bread knife more than a powered chainsaw.
description: A hand tool with a serrated metal blade and a straight wooden handle, lacking any powered or mechanical components. The design is simple and utilitarian, with no visible logos or safety features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the serrated blade and the wooden handle behind it.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the blade and handle, with the serrated edge clearly visible.
description_view_2: End-on view showing the thickness of the blade and the rectangular profile of the handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the straight alignment of the handle and blade, with the serrated edge on the lower side.
attribute_handle_design: Single straight wooden handle, rectangular in shape, with no visible ergonomic or safety features.
